framework.name: Deterministic-Probabilistic Spectrum for Agent Design
framework.description: A framework for positioning different types of agents on a spectrum from fully deterministic (predictable, auditable, policy-bound) to fully probabilistic (exploratory, adaptive, discovery-oriented). Workflow Agents sit on the deterministic end but incorporate probabilistic reasoning at decision points. The key trade-off is between control/auditability and flexibility/intelligence.
framework.raw_quote: Workflow Agents sit on the deterministic end of the agentic spectrum, but they're far from dumb pipelines. They bring agentic behaviors like dynamic path selection, multi-turn reasoning across steps, parallel branching, multi-agent collaboration, and self-correction.
